title: Print
text: Print Print data from the current form. Fields Print Job Model Print Mode How to Select the Print Mode you want. To choose a different print job model, clear the Print Job Model field or enter a retrieve profile, and click >> . In the Browse Print Job Model form, select the model you want to use and click OK . If you want to define a new print job model, click New . See Define a Print Job Model . Click OK to print. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
